                      Executive Order No. 767.
   APPOINTING MAJOR ALLEY D. RQREX, U. S. M. C.,
OFFICER 1N CHARGE O F THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE
AND PUBLIC JXSTRUCTIGN AND FOREIGN RELATIONS.

    By virtue of t h e powers vested in t h e iLlilitary G o v x n m e n t
of Santo Domingo, thz following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
      ARTICLE 1. Major Alley D. Rorex, U. S. M. C., is from
t h e date of this Executive Order, appointed Officer in charge of
t h e Departments of Justice and Public Instruction and Foreign
Relations, in t h e place of Lieutenant Colonel Fre,derick A. Ram-
sey, U. s. M. C., who is leaving Santo Domingo permanently.
                                HARRY L E E ,
                     Brigadier Genleral, E. S.Marine Corps,
                Acting MiBitary Governor of Sianto llomingo.
